headline: DaVita (DVA) Expands Integrated Kidney Care With AI Tools For Dialysis Care
summary: DaVita (NYSE:DVA) is expanding its Integrated Kidney Care platform, adding new capabilities aimed at value-based kidney care delivery. The company is rolling out AI-powered health technologies, including an AI-driven scheduling tool for dialysis care. These updates focus on improving care coordination, patient experience, and operational efficiency across DaVita's network. DaVita enters this phase of product and care model expansion with its stock at $234.91 and a value score of 3. The...
